query:
WITH target_pos AS (
  SELECT 'PO-BATCH-GUARD-1778504564630' AS po_number UNION ALL
  SELECT 'PO-BATCH-GUARD-1778504564630' UNION ALL
  SELECT 'PO-A1-NAME-1778504564634' UNION ALL
  SELECT 'PO-BATCH-BASE-1778504566881' UNION ALL
  SELECT 'PO-A1-NAME-1778504644297' UNION ALL
  SELECT 'PO-BATCH-GUARD-1778504644224' UNION ALL
  SELECT 'PO-BATCH-GUARD-1778504644224' UNION ALL
  SELECT 'PO-BATCH-BASE-1778504646788' UNION ALL
  SELECT 'PO-BATCH-GUARD-1778504711473' UNION ALL
  SELECT 'PO-BATCH-GUARD-1778504711473' UNION ALL
  SELECT 'PO-A1-NAME-1778504711475' UNION ALL
  SELECT 'PO-BATCH-BASE-1778504713676' UNION ALL
  SELECT 'PO-A1-NAME-1778504804493' UNION ALL
  SELECT 'PO-BATCH-GUARD-1778504804576' UNION ALL
  SELECT 'PO-BATCH-GUARD-1778504804576' UNION ALL
  SELECT 'PO-BATCH-BASE-1778504806894' UNION ALL
  SELECT 'PO-GOOGLE-BATCH-1778505341368' UNION ALL
  SELECT 'PO-A1-RENAME-1778505343489' UNION ALL
  SELECT 'PO-E-RESTORE-1778505346688' UNION ALL
  SELECT 'PO-GOOGLE-BATCH-1778505466118' UNION ALL
  SELECT 'PO-A1-RENAME-1778505468307' UNION ALL
  SELECT 'PO-E-RESTORE-1778505471600' UNION ALL
  SELECT 'PO-GOOGLE-BATCH-1778505509864' UNION ALL
  SELECT 'PO-A1-RENAME-1778505511918' UNION ALL
  SELECT 'PO-E-RESTORE-1778505515012' UNION ALL
  SELECT 'PO-GOOGLE-BATCH-1778505566147' UNION ALL
  SELECT 'PO-A1-RENAME-1778505568173' UNION ALL
  SELECT 'PO-E-RESTORE-1778505571223' UNION ALL
  SELECT 'PO-GOOGLE-BATCH-1778505671544' UNION ALL
  SELECT 'PO-A1-RENAME-1778505673687' UNION ALL
  SELECT 'PO-E-RESTORE-1778505677150'
), unique_pos AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT po_number FROM target_pos
), matched_products AS (
  SELECT p.id, p.po_number
  FROM products p
  INNER JOIN unique_pos t ON t.po_number = p.po_number
)
SELECT
  u.po_number,
  COUNT(DISTINCT mp.id) AS product_count,
  COUNT(DISTINCT st.id) AS task_count,
  COUNT(DISTINCT se.id) AS event_count,
  COUNT(DISTINCT sr.id) AS sampling_result_count,
  COUNT(DISTINCT psd.id) AS productivity_score_detail_count
FROM unique_pos u
LEFT JOIN matched_products mp ON mp.po_number = u.po_number
LEFT JOIN station_tasks st ON st.product_id = mp.id
LEFT JOIN station_events se ON se.product_id = mp.id
LEFT JOIN sampling_results sr ON sr.product_id = mp.id
LEFT JOIN productivity_score_details psd ON psd.station_event_id = se.id
GROUP BY u.po_number
ORDER BY u.po_number;
